chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 31 of 2026 Present; Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.81/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.82/2026 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.83/2026 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 14.01.2026 M/s Illahi Bux Jamali and Ghulam Shabbir Bhutto, Advocates for the Petitioner O R D E R Muhammad Jaffer Raza, J- Through instant Constitutional Petition, the Petitioner has impugned the Show Cause Notice dated 11.11.2025 issued by Respondent No.4, where the petitioner is performing his duties as Prison Constable. It is averred that the impugned Show Cause Notice is mala fide and the allegations contained therein are fabricated. We have examined the contents of the impugned Show Cause Notice issued to the Petitioner, wherein the charges mentioned were specified. Even otherwise invoking the writ jurisdiction against Show Cause Notice has been deprecated by the Honourable Supreme Court in the case of 1Commissioner Inland Revenue and others vs. Jehangir Khan Tareen and others. In the light of same, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI 1 2022 SCMR 92
